raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſtika tas/ un bes malinis
neveens zits. Ka irr tas par
weenu pohstu Weetu tappis?
par Apgulſchanas Weetu to
Swehrnu? Wiſs/ kas zaureet win-
nu iſtwilpehs/ un fasittihg faruu
Rohku pahr winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
Gluddinaschana un Waimannas prett Jerusa,
lemi: 1. Un tahs paschas Ne-atgreeſcha.
un : 2. Ar weenu Eeprezinafchanu preekſch
teem Deewatizzigeem : 9. Ka Deews tobs
uhſturrehg/ un pee faruu Atſſſchann wed.
Dihs zaar Kristu/ un zaar ta paſcha Mahzi,
schanu no jawas Scheblastiibas un Nopel.
neem: 11/15/18.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Aj tam negantam/ un
Wapgahnitam/tam breeſ-
migam Pilsfahtam!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas ne paklaufa tai Balk-
nei/ ne uſjenum to Pahrmahzi-
tchanu/ ne palaischahs uhs to
KUNGU/ ue ateet pee farwa
Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winna Peel-Kungi irr ruhk-
daini Lauwas winna Widdû /
winnu Sohgi irr Walkara Wil-
ki/ kas ne Kaulu atlizzina lithds
Rihtam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winna Pratweefcht irr
Blehschi/ Tizzitas Pahrlausita-
ji/ fagahua to Swehtunu/ un
padarra Warras-Darbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr taiſus
winzo Widdû/ wiſch ne padar-
ra Netaisnibu/ ikrihta ness
wiſch farwu Teefu Gaifmâ/ tur
ne truhſt neneeka/ tomehr tee
Neleeſcht Kanun ne proht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſimu tohs Paganus
isdeldejs/ winan Stuhri irr poh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es fazziju : Tew b
mañi bihteeg/to Pahrmahzife
nu uſjent/ ka winnu Mahi
Weeta ne taptu isdeldeta z
wiſfu/ ar ko es winnu peeme
ju. Teefchain/ tee irr agri
luscheeg/ wiſſus favus Dar
irr tee mahttajſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht irr jums man
jagaida / fakka tas KUNG
Tai Deena/ kad es pa Gall
zelschohs/ jo manna Teefa
tobs Paganus fafraht / t
Walſtivas fapulzinaht / un
gahst pahr teem mannu Du
bu / wiſfu mannu Bahrs
Karstumu/ jo wiſta fchi Seu
taps zaar to ugguni ma
Karſtuma aprihta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad peegreesifchu es
teem Laudim weenu fehfi
Wallodn/ ka wiſſeem buhe
KUNGA Wahrdu peefaukt/
winnam kalpoht ar ween
Prahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No winnufs to Mo
upju manni Pecluhdſeji
Uppurus neffibs/ ar to M
manno Iſkatſtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tai Deena tu ne t
Kauna wiſto tawo Darbu d
ar ko tu prett mannim effi pe
kahputi. Jo tad es atjemſchu
tawa Widdus tawus lep
Leelitajns/ un tu ne pa-au
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
